response.overview: This documentary offers a firsthand look at the life and work of Mati Ureta de Caplansky, Peru's first female psychoanalyst. Based on conversations and reflections with the protagonist on a variety of topics, the film explores the personal and professional world of this distinguished psychoanalyst, providing a direct account of her life, profession, and work. With a profound and moving narrative, the documentary reveals the struggles and triumphs of a woman who broke barriers during a difficult period in our country, offering a clear vision of her contribution to the understanding of the human mind. "Conversations" not only celebrates the life of a pioneer but also invites the viewer to reflect. This is an essential work for those seeking to understand the intersection between the personal and professional history of one of the most influential figures in the history of psychology in Peru.
response.title: Conversaciones: Mati Ureta de Caplansky
